entity.summary: Hybrid order-book exchange associated with the Internet Computer ecosystem, designed to combine Web2 execution speed with Web3 settlement and security.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Helix Markets as a hybrid multi-chain order-book exchange on ICP and preserves substantial cumulative DEX volume, but current TVL is zero and no recent-volume window is reported. The first-party website is linked by the registry but was not independently verified in this review, so HEI uses limited and live_unverified rather than active.

evidence.title: Helix Markets official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is linked from the current protocol registry but the trading interface was not independently verified during this review.

evidence.title: Helix Markets protocol metrics and information
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies Helix Markets as a hybrid order-book exchange on ICP, links helixapp.com, reports zero current TVL, and preserves substantial cumulative DEX volume.
